name: Rand Paul
subject: This fight is far from over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Real quick, Fellow Conservative --

The media and the political establishment are going all-out to blackout and silence my message.

Despite yet another poll confirming that I'm in the top 5 (and within the margin of error for 3rd place), the mainstream media and the Washington Machine refuse to report our success.

And my dad, Ron Paul, **[recorded a special message](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467559:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)** explaining just how important it is that you and I fight back.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467559:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)

The media likes to downplay or just flat-out ignore my grassroots driven campaign.

They're doubling-down to drown out our message.

But the only way that happens is if liberty-loving Americans like you, Fellow Conservative, let them.

So, I'm fighting back -- hard.

That's why I'm asking every one of my grassroots supporters to **[chip in with an emergency contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467559:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)** to my "5th of November" Money Bomb.

This fight is far from over. I'm not ready to give up -- and I hope you're not ready either.

**[So please watch the special message from my dad, Ron Paul, then help me by chipping in $20.16 to my campaign right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467559:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467560:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467561:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467562:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467563:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467559:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467559:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467564:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467565:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467566:sbQxeTyNP:m:1:879035888:4BA65BF47F24561DD69B09F402BCF6DB:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: James Garcia
subject: Heading in to Tuesday's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44774278:JLwEudLNb:m:1:1516426255:EFC5A166E34A189B9CE9C5471B16CC0E:r) |
| | | Here's what Governor Christie had to say about FOX Business Network's debate lineup for Tuesday. We couldn't agree more. Governor Christie is the most tested, ready and mature leader in the field. He's a proven fighter and it doesn't matter what stage he's on to fight for the American people. Tuesday night, he will, once again, show why he is the person best prepared to be President. We have seen growing momentum since the CNBC debate as people are giving Governor Christie a more serious look as a viable contender. This culminated this week as a video of Governor Christie speaking passionately and personally about drug addiction went viral - with over 6 million views.
* [_Huffington Post_ : Christie Makes Emotional Plea To Rethink Drug Addiction Treatment](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44774279:JLwEudLNb:m:1:1516426255:EFC5A166E34A189B9CE9C5471B16CC0E:r)
* [_Breitbart_ \- Chris Christie's Moving Plea for Treating Addiction: 'Every Life is an Individual Gift From God'](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44774280:JLwEudLNb:m:1:1516426255:EFC5A166E34A189B9CE9C5471B16CC0E:r)

In a race where according to the latest CBS/NYT poll 71% of Republican primary voters have said it's too early to make a decision, we know Chris Christie is well positioned to keep campaigning aggressively until the first votes are cast. Christie has been spending substantial time in the states interacting directly with voters and seeing his image steadily improve. It's real and sustained progress that is a future indicator of ballot strength and as the Monmouth poll from November 2nd states, "candidate ratings can be a leading indicator for potential shifts in the vote choice." Governor Christie has improved his ballot score in every single national poll since the debate.
* 2% (+1) - FOX
* 3% (+1) - Quinnipiac
* 4% (+1) - Morning Consult
* 5% (+2) - Reuters

Governor Christie has improved his ballot score in primary state polls since the debate.
* 8% (+6) - WBUR in New Hampshire to surpass Jeb Bush
* 3% (+2) - CNN and PPP in Iowa

National and state polls have come out showing his favorable ratings better than ever, higher than Jeb Bush and John Kasich nationally and in New Hampshire and Iowa.
* Governor Christie's fav/unfav nationally is 57/23 (+34), that's a 27 point increase in Christie's net favorability since August
* Governor Christie's fav/unfav in New Hampshire is 54/27 (+27), that's a 23 point increase in Christie's net favorability since September.
* Governor Christie's fav/unfav in Iowa is 48/28 (+20), that's a 30 point increase in Christie's net favorability rating since August. Governor Christie's combined first and second choice support has doubled since September, up from 4% to 8%.

It is clear that Governor Christie is only rising in the polls in primary states and the best candidate to take on Clinton and the Democrats next year. As Governor Christie said yesterday at his 30th town hall in New Hampshire: "I'm going to fight as hard as I have to fight to become your president and the good news for you on that is then once I get there, you'll never have to wonder how hard I'm willing to fight for you because you'll have watched me fight. You'll have seen what I'm capable of when I'm trying to get there. I hear lots of people in this race, who are all moaning about one thing or another. I mean, like, oh you know, I don't like this, I don't like that. This isn't fun. I thought this was going to be more fun. I thought this was going to be different. I thought this was going to be better. I don't like this guy. I don't like her. I don't like him. Stop. You're running for President of the United States. It is an extraordinary honor and privilege just to have a chance to stand on the stage and run for President of the United States. Believe me." \- James ****
---

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44774281:JLwEudLNb:m:1:1516426255:EFC5A166E34A189B9CE9C5471B16CC0E:r)
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44774282:JLwEudLNb:m:1:1516426255:EFC5A166E34A189B9CE9C5471B16CC0E:r)

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44774284:JLwEudLNb:m:1:1516426255:EFC5A166E34A189B9CE9C5471B16CC0E:r)

---

Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Muslim Brotherhood
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and even Russia all label the Muslim Brotherhood as a terrorist organization, but Barack Obama still refuses to do so. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31479854:WXWOL8yaN:m:1:1104269936:8FCC055C669EB6775FB76A958AF68450:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and even Russia all label the Muslim Brotherhood as a terrorist organization, but Barack Obama still refuses to do so.

Despite irrefutable evidence that the Muslim Brotherhood provided 'media, money and men' to Hamas -- Obama and his administration refuse to label the Muslim Brotherhood as a terrorist group.

**You see: the Muslim Brotherhood was successfully prosecuted in the largest terrorism-financing trial in American history...but what does that mean?**

What happened because of the successful prosecution?

**Nothing! Obama has done nothing to bring them to justice.**

I'm not going to mince words -- the Muslim Brotherhood is an international organization providing integral support to terrorists and waging violent jihad against our allies. **They MUST be held accountable.**

Friend, formally listing the Muslim Brotherhood as a terrorist organization is the first step to putting an end to their acts of terrorism.

Until the Brotherhood is formally designated as a foreign terrorist organization -- they are free to travel in and out of our country, recruit Americans, and continue funneling funds to violent, known terrorist organizations like Hamas.

Friend, it's time we stop pretending and see them for what they are -- financiers of terrorism.

**I am standing up to them and sponsoring legislation in Congress to formally list the Muslim Brotherhood as a terrorist organization.** As president, I'll work to eliminate them and keep our country safe from the threat of terrorism.

That's where you come in -- I need you on my team. And because the legislation to do this is before Congress now, **we must act immediately!**

**[Please stand with me today and make a contribution of $35, $50, or $250 today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31479854:WXWOL8yaN:m:1:1104269936:8FCC055C669EB6775FB76A958AF68450:r)**

We need a president who doesn't hide from, make excuses for, or negotiate with terrorist organizations.

Obama and his administration have protected the Muslim Brotherhood and even met with members of the Brotherhood in the White House.

I need your immediate support to pressure Congress into taking on Obama and the Brotherhood.

**[Are you with me?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31479854:WXWOL8yaN:m:1:1104269936:8FCC055C669EB6775FB76A958AF68450:r)**

The Muslim Brotherhood meets the criteria for designation as a foreign terrorist organization.

I know my position will not be popular, and **the left will try to paint the notion that Muslim Brotherhood is a peaceful political group. You and I both know that couldn't be further from the truth.**

Before we can seize assets and keep these known terrorists out of our country, we must designate them as a foreign terrorist organization.

**[If you agree -- we need a president who will fight terrorists...not welcome them to the White House -- can I count on you to chip in $35, $50, or $250?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31479854:WXWOL8yaN:m:1:1104269936:8FCC055C669EB6775FB76A958AF68450:r)**

The media attacks are sure to be brutal, and I need your help to stand up against them.

**[Please, show your support now before Congress takes this to a vote.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31479854:WXWOL8yaN:m:1:1104269936:8FCC055C669EB6775FB76A958AF68450:r)**

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

|

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Comeback brewing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

With less than 90 days before the Iowa caucus, the presidential race is tightening.

Next week's debate was narrowed down to 8 candidates. And that's great news for us. It means more time and more attention for our ideas.

And more opportunity to continue on our comeback path.

Fellow Conservative, it couldn't be a better time to double down on the comeback recent polls show is just starting...

**[But I'm counting on you to help reach my campaign's $300,000 fundraising goal by tomorrow night at midnight to help me break through the media blackout](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478824:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)**!

I know our national media and Big Government apologists in BOTH parties would have loved nothing more than to keep me off the debate stage.

But my crystal clear message of liberty, limited government, lower taxes, and a return to constitutional principles cannot be silenced.

Thanks to your generous support, the most recent Fox News poll shows my campaign surging into 5th place -- tied with one-time establishment favorite Jeb Bush!

Other candidates' media-reliant, top heavy campaigns are houses of cards ready to come crumbling down.

But my campaign -- just like the policies I plan to implement as President -- focus on what works.

In a campaign, that means boots on the ground. It means constant voter contact.

It means criss-crossing key early primary states, shaking hands, and flooding inboxes, mailboxes and TV airwaves with a winning message.

As President, it will mean destroying the Washington Machine and getting government off our backs and out of our lives.

Fellow Conservative, America was never intended to be a country where we're coddled from cradle to grave and government overlords spy on, regulate, and tax our every move.

Free people, left up to make their own decisions out from the watchful eye of government bureaucrats, have made this nation the greatest in human history.

Today, politicians in BOTH parties are doing everything in their power to snuff out the American Dream.

They've spent our nation into oblivion, and they've virtually turned "liberty" into a dirty word.

America needs a comeback.

With your help, we can ensure the brightest days lay in our future with my bold plans to:

>>> _CUT TAXES_ and institute a 14.5% across-the-board fair-flat tax. This will return $2 TRILLION to the American people and result in a GDP growth of a whopping 10% a year;

>>> _IMPOSE TERM LIMITS_ and end the reign of career politicians in Washington. The fact is, we need citizen legislators -- those who have lived under government's heavy hand, not spent their life on the taxpayer dole;

>>> _FORCE CONGRESS TO READ THE BILLS_. Insider lobbyists, well-connect corporations and party cronies know how to work the system. And thousand-page spending bills, passed under threat of impending doom are their best friends. We can stop much of this madness by forcing Congress to wait one day for every 20 pages of a bill's text before it can be voted into law;

>>> _AUDIT THE FED_ , and end their insider cronyism. Just a limited past audit showed the Fed issued $16 TRILLION in secret loans and deals to foreign banks and companies! That's more than four times what Congress spends every year under President Obama. Yet the Fed gets virtually no scrutiny? This can't continue;

>>> _ENFORCE THE BILL OF RIGHTS_. The Founders gave us the Bill of Rights to protect us to check government power. Today, we're being promised that if we just give up our liberty everything will be "A-OK." We must not buy these lies.

Fellow Conservative, this message is resonating. My campaign's grassroots strategy is working.

But it's time to start ramping up pressure. It's time to double down on the momentum that's just starting.

So will you help me reach our $300,000 goal by midnight Sunday?

**[Can you chip in $20.16 or even more](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478824:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)**?

Your support will make all the difference.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478825:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478826:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478827:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478828:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478824:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478829:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478830:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31478831:WerD18yzN:m:1:879035888:B58D941053A89EEC8DA0343645549F64:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

As President, it will mean destroying the Washington Machine and getting government off our backs and out of our lives. Fellow Conservative, America was never intended to be a country where we're coddled from cradle to grave and government overlords spy on, regulate, and tax our every move. Free people, left up to make their own decisions out from the watchful eye of government bureaucrats, have made this nation the greatest in human history. Today, politicians in BOTH parties are doing everything in their power to snuff out the American Dream. They've spent our nation into oblivion, and they've virtually turned "liberty" into a dirty word. America needs a comeback. With your help, we can ensure the brightest days lay in our future with my bold plans to: >> CUT TAXES and institute a 14.5% across-the-board fair-flat tax. This will return $2 TRILLION to the American people and result in a GDP growth of a whopping 10% a year; >> IMPOSE TERM LIMITS and end the reign of career politicians in Washington. The fact is, we need citizen legislators -- those who have lived under government's heavy hand, not spent their life on the taxpayer dole; >> FORCE CONGRESS TO READ THE BILLS. Insider lobbyists, well-connect corporations and party cronies know how to work the system. And thousand-page spending bills, passed under threat of impending doom are their best friends. We can stop much of this madness by forcing Congress to wait one day for every 20 pages of a bill's text before it can be voted into law; >> AUDIT THE FED , and end their insider cronyism. Just a limited past audit showed the Fed issued $16 TRILLION in secret loans and deals to foreign banks and companies! That's more than four times what Congress spends every year under President Obama. Yet the Fed gets virtually no scrutiny? This can't continue; >> ENFORCE THE BILL OF RIGHTS. The Founders gave us the Bill of Rights to protect us to check government power. Today, we're being promised that if we just give up our liberty everything will be "A-OK." We must not buy these lies. Fellow Conservative, this message is resonating. My campaign's grassroots strategy is working. But it's time to start ramping up pressure. It's time to double down on the momentum that's just starting. So will you help me reach our $300,000 goal by midnight Sunday? ? Your support will make all the difference. | | In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-30239106413-echo3-5A8BCF377AB89C21DD30E19B345AC995@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

Peter,

The next GOP debate, sponsored by the Fox Business Network and the _Wall Street Journal_ , is on Tuesday, November 10 in Milwaukee, WI.

And we've got two extra tickets for two lucky supporters.

[**If you'd like to be automatically entered for a chance to win, just donate $5 or more before midnight on Saturday, November 7.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31482085:sZqaC8ypN:m:1:876315805:C0189DF2EED978A9A6B43FA746F64459:r)

Thanks for your support, and I hope you'll enter now.

-Ben

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS SWEEPSTAKES** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this sweepstakes. name: Cliff Maloney
subject: PROJECT: Caucus Takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Supporter,

Today Students for Rand (SFR) is pleased to
announce our first Get-Out-The-Vote effort with the launching of
"The Caucus Takeover" with Rand Paul in Iowa.

Check it out...

The mainstream media wants to write off our
campaign, but we are #JustGettingStarted here at Students for
Rand. Join hundreds of students nationwide and RSVP at
www.randpaul.com/students/gotv/iowa right away.

Here are the basics:

Who: Students and the young-at-heart between
the ages of 18-35 who support Rand Paul for President.

What: 11 days of Get-Out-The-Vote efforts
(phone banking/door knocking)

Where: Des Moines, Iowa

When: Arrive in Iowa on January 23rd and
depart on February 2nd of 2016.

Why: The Caucus Takeover is vital for turning
out Iowa Rand Paul supporters.

How: You get yourself to Des Moines, Iowa and
we will take care of the rest. Lodging, Iowa transportation, and
food will be provided by the Rand Paul for President campaign.

Help us continue to build the SFR army and
forward this to 5 students you know that #StandWithRand!

In Liberty,

Cliff Maloney Jr.
National Youth Director
Rand Paul for President

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: Secret’s out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

This past Tuesday, Pennsylvania voters overwhelmingly chose Democratic judges up and down the ballot to serve on our courts -- judges who are committed to restoring fairness, justice, accountability, and honor to our courts.

**Because of Tuesday 's wins, Republicans are worried.** They're worried that if they don't do something very big, very fast, then in exactly one year, they're going to see the same results when voters go to the polls to elect our next U.S. Senator. And Friend, they can't afford to allow that to happen.

That's why we know that on the heels of Tuesday's stunning Democratic victories, **Republican party leaders are gathered in a dark room somewhere, frantically plotting and scheming about how they 're going to raise and spend millions and millions of dollars to beat Katie McGinty** in her campaign to unseat Republican Senator Pat Toomey.

[**Our election is a year out, but there 's no time to spare. Can you contribute $5 or more to Katie's campaign right now so we can ensure we see the same tremendous Democratic victories next fall?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6169226805623390208/-2200831952179691520?refcode=e20151106nd&amount=5)

Katie is going to be a strong advocate for working families in the Senate. She knows that because of the policies of Republicans like Pat Toomey, Americans have both struggled to get by _and_ been denied the opportunity to get ahead. That's why she'll fight for policies like a higher minimum wage, access to affordable education, and health care for all.

But now the secret's out: Republicans know that there's a fierce Democratic wave sweeping across Pennsylvania, and they're going to _do_ whatever it takes -- and _spend_ however much it takes -- to stop Katie from winning the kind of decisive victory our candidates saw just a few days ago.

[**Republicans are mobilizing their big-money donors, and we need the collective power of our grassroots supporters to fight back. Contribute $5 or more today to help us have the resources we need to send Katie to the U.S. Senate where she 'll stand up for Democratic values.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6169226805623390208/-2200831952179691520?refcode=e20151106nd&amount=5)

Republicans may be gathering their big money donors, but as we proved last Tuesday, there's nothing that can beat the enormous grassroots support of the American people.

Thanks for being with us. Not one of these victories would be possible without you.

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6169226805623390208/-2200831952179691520?refcode=e20151106nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6169226805623390208/-2272889546217619456).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Rand Paul
subject: The Federal Reserve is a racket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Supporter,

The Federal Reserve's cronies and our national media have been on the attack against me for months.

They know I'm determined to expose every ounce of their corruption and cronyism.

And they know I'm going all out to EXPOSE the Fed and its allies in Congress by forcing the U.S. Senate on record on my Audit the Fed Bill.

**[Will you join this fight and help reach my campaign's $300,000 fundraising goal by tomorrow at midnight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487643:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)**?

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487643:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)

Supporter, it couldn't be a better time to double down.

Already, limited audits have shown the Fed doled out $16 TRILLION in sweetheart loans to foreign banks and corporations.

That's more than four times what Congress spends every year under President Obama.

Yet the Fed gets virtually no scrutiny?

If we allow this madness to go on, it will result in absolute DISASTER for the American economy and the U.S. dollar.

Supporter, I'm ready to finally EXPOSE this racket to the American people!

Audit the Fed will be brought to the floor for a full Senate vote in just a matter of days. And I'm counting on you to help me.

**[So please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487643:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487644:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487645:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)

[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487647:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487643:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487648:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487649:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31487650:skzFK8yNE:m:1:879035888:711EC506A613675903EDD29C6571C8FE:r)

name: Claire Sandberg, Bernie 2016
subject: All you need to do is show up
body:
#
Bernie Supporter,
We have a simple plan to win the nomination and the election for Bernie. It's going to work, but only if you show up to the events that local organizers have planned in your community. They're waiting for you -- please don't let them down. **RSVP to attend this event near you, or check our map for others:**
**What:** Walking & Cleaning Our Environment in Silver Spring
**Where:** Glenmont Metro Station (by the escalators) opposite side of the bus terminal.
12521 Georgia Ave Silver Spring
Silver Spring, MD 20906
**When:** Saturday, November 14th
7:45 am EST
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vj2b)
**For our Week of Action: November 9-15, many Bernie volunteers have planned activities in your community -- everything from phone banking and block walking to leafleting and voter registration. This is the work that wins elections.**
[**It 's all been planned for you by volunteers in your community, and now all you have to do is show up!**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vj2b)
Want to find other events happening near you? [**Click here to search for more events.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2701/43f17890/5399c244/621ecd72/1190975980/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=E&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")
If everyone on our email list signed up for an event, we would instantly have a volunteer army large enough to knock on every door in the country.
It's up to all of us together. Bernie really can become president -- we just need to show up!
**Don 't miss out on the Week of Action: November 9-15.** You'll meet some great new Bernie supporters, and you'll feel great about the work you've done to elect Bernie.
It's an honor to working with you in this movement. See you next week!
Claire Sandberg
Director of Digital Organizing
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2701/43f17890/5399c244/621ecd73/1190975980/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2701/43f17890/5399c244/621ecd70/1190975980/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2701/43f17890/5399c244/621ecd71/1190975980/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2701/43f17890/5399c244/621ecd7e/1190975980/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Bernie Supporter, We have a simple plan to win the nomination and the election for Bernie. It's going to work, but only if you show up to the events that local organizers have planned in your community. They're waiting for you -- please don't let them down. RSVP to attend this event near you, or check our map for others: What: Walking & Cleaning Our Environment in Silver Spring Where: Glenmont Metro Station (by the escalators) opposite side of the bus terminal. 12521 Georgia Ave Silver Spring Silver Spring, MD 20906 When: Saturday, November 14th 7:45 am EST For our Week of Action: November 9-15, many Bernie volunteers have planned activities in your community -- everything from phone banking and block walking to leafleting and voter registration. This is the work that wins elections. Want to find other events happening near you? "" If everyone on our email list signed up for an event, we would instantly have a volunteer army large enough to knock on every door in the country. It's up to all of us together. Bernie really can become president -- we just need to show up! Don 't miss out on the Week of Action: November 9-15. You'll meet some great new Bernie supporters, and you'll feel great about the work you've done to elect Bernie. It's an honor to working with you in this movement. See you next week! Claire Sandberg Director of Digital Organizing Bernie 2016 Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: If you’re on my team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Get on the roster! | Friend --

When you walk into our campaign headquarters, the first thing you see is our official Donor Wall -- a wall that lists the names of people who've chipped in to own a piece of this campaign, whether it's $1 or $1,000.

**[I would love to see your name on our wall. We're only adding new names over the next few days, so chip in $1 now to make sure you’re included.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This wall makes a statement about our campaign, who we are, and what we stand for. We aren't funded by a handful of billionaires writing checks to advance their own interests. We're parents, neighbors, and friends, all doing our part to make life better for every American family, not just those at the top.

**I'm so proud you're on this team, and I think you should be recognized for it. Chip in $1 right now to make sure your name is on the official Donor Wall:**
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM5MzQ0NDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNTkzMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
